title: Report: Zhiyuan Robotics Said to Be Striving for IPO with a Target Valuation of $20 Billion
excerpt: It is reported that the embodied intelligence company Zhiyuan Robotics is advancing its IPO plan with an estimated valuation of about 20 billion US dollars, and
content_html:
It is reported that the embodied intelligence company Zhiyuan Robotics is advancing its IPO plan with an estimated valuation of about 20 billion US dollars, and has already introduced CITIC Securities as a tutoring sponsor. The company expects to achieve revenue of 4 billion yuan throughout 2026. Currently, regarding the valuation and listing plan,

during the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), Zhiyuan focused on the "Three Intelligences Integrated" product technology architecture, and released five new robot models, including Expedition A3Ultra, Sprite G2Max, Lixi X2EDU version, Critical Point OmniHand3Ultra-M, and Cooltop's first riding robot in the world. At the same time, the company also demonstrated the embodied intelligence foundation model and real scenario deployment cases, among other ecological achievements.

In recent years, with the accelerated integration of artificial intelligence, large models, and robot technology, embodied intelligence has become a new competitive direction in the AI industry. Enterprises are shifting from single hardware development to a comprehensive layout of "model + robot body + application ecosystem", and commercialization capabilities have become the focus of industry attention.

Zhiyuan's current advancement of capital market plans, and continuous expansion of the robot product matrix, indicates that it is accelerating the layout of large-scale commercial applications. If the IPO proceeds smoothly, it will further promote the financing and industrialization process of domestic embodied intelligence enterprises.

sentences.zh: 2026世界人工智能大会（WAIC）期间，致远聚焦“三智融合”产品技术架构，发布了Expedition A3Ultra、Sprite G2Max、立溪X2EDU版、Critical Point OmniHand3Ultra-M、酷拓全球首款骑行机器人等五款机器人新品。

sentences.en: Zhiyuan's current advancement of capital market plans, and continuous expansion of the robot product matrix, indicates that it is accelerating the layout of large-scale commercial applications.
sentences.zh: 致远目前资本市场计划的推进，以及机器人产品矩阵的不断扩张，预示着其正在加速大规模商业应用的布局。

sentences.en: If the IPO proceeds smoothly, it will further promote the financing and industrialization process of domestic embodied intelligence enterprises.
sentences.zh: 如果IPO顺利进行，将进一步推动国内物联网企业的融资和产业化进程。

content_html_zh:
据悉，具身智能公司致远机器人正在推进IPO计划，预计估值约200亿美元，并已引入中信证券作为辅导保荐人。 公司预计2026年全年实现营收40亿元。 目前，关于估值及上市方案，

2026世界人工智能大会（WAIC）期间，致远聚焦“三智融合”产品技术架构，发布了Expedition A3Ultra、Sprite G2Max、立溪X2EDU版、Critical Point OmniHand3Ultra-M、酷拓全球首款骑行机器人等五款机器人新品。 同时，公司还展示了体现的智能基础模型和真实场景部署案例等生态成果。

近年来，随着人工智能、大模型、机器人技术的加速融合，具身智能成为人工智能行业新的竞争方向。 企业正从单一硬件开发转向“模型+机器人本体+应用生态”的全面布局，商业化能力成为行业关注的焦点。

致远目前资本市场计划的推进，以及机器人产品矩阵的不断扩张，预示着其正在加速大规模商业应用的布局。 如果IPO顺利进行，将进一步推动国内物联网企业的融资和产业化进程。
